meta.title: The Health Care Excise Tax: Panel Highlights
meta.description: Highlights of Bill Samuel, Paul N. Van de Water, Tevi Troy and Paul Howard's discussion on the implications of the excise tax for employer health plans in both the public and private sectors, as well as its impact on labor unions.
